Home / Services / Exterior Painting

Exterior Painting

Protect and beautify your home with our professional exterior painting services.

Indianapolis' harsh weather can take a toll on your home's exterior. Affordable Painting LLC provides expert exterior painting services to protect your investment and enhance curb appeal. We understand the unique challenges of painting in Indiana's climate, including freeze-thaw cycles and humidity. Our team meticulously prepares surfaces by power washing, scraping loose paint, and repairing damaged areas. We use high-quality exterior paints that are specifically formulated to withstand the elements and provide long-lasting protection against moisture, fading, and cracking. Whether you have a historic home in Irvington or a modern residence in Fishers, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results. We handle all types of siding, including wood, vinyl, and aluminum. We also offer specialized coatings for decks, fences, and other outdoor structures.

Our Process

  1. 01 Power Washing & Surface Cleaning
  2. 02 Scraping Loose Paint & Sanding
  3. 03 Priming (if necessary)
  4. 04 Application of Exterior Paint (two coats standard)
  5. 05 Final Inspection & Cleanup

Benefits

  • Increased Curb Appeal
  • Protection Against Weather Damage
  • Extended Siding Lifespan
  • Improved Home Value

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I paint my home's exterior?

Generally, exterior painting is recommended every 5-10 years, depending on the type of siding and the severity of the weather conditions.

Do you offer color consultations for exterior painting?

Yes, we provide color consultations to help you choose the perfect colors for your home's exterior.

Are you insured?

Yes, Affordable Painting LLC is fully licensed and insured for your peace of mind.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with exterior painting? Contact us today.
